testcase.name: login

error.message: element click intercepted: Element <button type="submit" data-qa="login-button" class="btn btn-default">...</button> is not clickable at point (330, 433). Other element would receive the click: <iframe id="aswift_2" name="aswift_2" style="min-height: auto !important; max-height: none !important; min-width: auto !important; max-width: none !important; width: 100vw !important;
